_publications._publicationTitle: Hybridization Capture-Based Next-Generation Sequencing to Evaluate Coding Sequence and Deep Intronic Mutations in the NF1 Gene.

_contextSnippet: By manually checking all possible pathogenic variants calls with the IGV software, we were able to identify some as homopolymer artifacts and thus they did not lead to false positive results
details: Successfully identified homopolymer artifacts during manual checking of pathogenic variant calls, preventing false positive results
